/usr/bin/ar qc libtensor_lib.a CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/tensor/tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/nn/softmax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/nn/linear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/nn/swiglu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/nn/embedding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_lib.dir/src/nn/rmsnorm.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtensor_lib.a
